cards.name: Rotate Ion Shields
cards.ability: Play in the damage phase.  Remove 1 blast unit from an Imperial Knights or Chaos Knights unit.

cards.name: Full Tilt
cards.ability: Play in the action phase. Imperial Knights or Chaos Knights units in a detachment gain 6” to their Move.

cards.name: Thunderstomp
cards.ability: Use in an action phase. After an Imperial Knight or Chaos Knight unit fights, roll a D12 for each enemy light unit in base contact with it. On an 6+, that unit gets a blast marker.

cards.name: Devestating Attack
cards.ability: Use in the action phase.  A single Imperial Knight or Chaos Knight unit gets +1 to hit and damage rolls in melee.

cards.name: Heirlooms of the Household
cards.ability: Search your deck for a Knight, Imperial Knight or Traitor Knight card, and then play it.

cards.name: Ion Aegis
cards.ability: Use in the damage phase.  Chose an Imperial Knight.  Imperial units within 6” of it gain Ignore Damage (6+) ability.

cards.name: Legendary Hero
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. A Freeblade unit can reroll hit and wound rolls.

cards.name: Benevolence of The Machine God
cards.ability: Use in the Order phase.  A Questor Mechanicus unit can roll a d6 for each damage marker on it. On a 5+, remove 1 damage marker from that unit.

cards.name: Valiant Last Stand
cards.ability: Use when a Questor Imperialis unit is destroyed. Before removing it, it makes a free shoot or fight action.

cards.name: The Traitor's Mark
cards.ability: Use at the start of the damage phase. One Questor Traitoris unit gains the Terror Troops ability until the end of the phase. Then you may force the closest enemy unit within 6” of the Traitoris unit to make an immediate morale test.

cards.name: Glory of the Charge
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a House Griffith Commander. The order is changed to Assault, and until the end of the phase, reroll missed hits for melee attacks for House Griffith units in that detachment.

cards.name: Gallant Warriors
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. House Terryn units in a detachment add 1 to their Attacks and hit rolls made with melee attacks, until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Relentless March
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a House Krast Commander. The order is changed to Advance, and until the end of the phase, double the Move Characterstic for House Krast units in that detachment.

cards.name: OathKeepers
cards.ability: Use in the action phase.  House Hawkshroud units in a detachment ignore criticaly damaged penalties and gain 1 to hit rolls against a chosen enemy unit.

cards.name: Hunters of the Foe
cards.ability: Use in the Action Phase.  House Cadmus units in an attachment may reroll wound rolls for melee attacks against light units.

cards.name: Close-Quarters Killers
cards.ability: Use in the Action phase. Select 1 House Mortan unit. It may make an additional fight action after its normal actions this phase.

cards.name: Cold Fury
cards.ability: Use in the Action phase. Select 1 House Krast unit that hasn't carried out its order. A unit that scores a hit with a melee weapon scores 2 hits instead of 1, for 3 for a super-heavy attack.

cards.name: Firestorm Protocols
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a House Vulker Commander. The order is changed to Aimed Fire, and one House Vulker unit may make an a free additional shoot action.

cards.name: Omnissiah's Grace
cards.ability: Use in the damage phase. Units in a House Taranis Detachment gain the Ignore Damage(5+) ability.

cards.name: Incantation of the Iron Soul
cards.ability: Play during the start of the Damage Phase. Adeptus Mechanicus units in a detachment automatically pass morale tests.

cards.name: Benediction of the Omnissiah
cards.ability: Play in any phase.  One Adeptus Mechanic Detachment rolls D12s instead of D6s for ranged hit rolls until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Chant of the Remorseless Fist
cards.ability: Play in any phase.  One Adeptus Mechanic Detachment rolls D12s instead of D6s for melee hit rolls until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Machine Spirits Revenge
cards.ability: Play when an Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle unit is destroyed.  Roll a d6 for each unit within 6” of it. On a 4+, that unit gets a blast marker.

cards.name: Acquisition at Any Cost
cards.ability: Use in any phase. Adeptus Mechanicus units of a chosen detachment have Objective Secured ability until end of turn. This turn, an Adeptus Mechanicus Warlord in that detachment can roll a D12 instead of a D6 for one Armour Save roll.

cards.name: Litany of the Electromancer
cards.ability: Use in an action phase. Roll a D12 for each Adeptus Mechanicus unit of one detachment in base contact with an enemy unit. On an 8+, each enemy in base contact with that unit gts a blast marker.

cards.name: Protector Imperative
cards.ability: Use in an action phase. 3 Skitarii units in your army may make a free shoot action.

cards.name: Machine Spirit Resurgent
cards.ability: Use during the Damage phase. Mechanicus Vehicle Units in a single detachment get Ignore Damage (5+) ability.

cards.name: Gloria Mechanicus
cards.ability: Play at any time. Search your deck for a Canticle and play it.

cards.name: First-Hand Field Testing
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. 1 Ryza Character in your army within 24” of an enemy unit rolls a d6.  If the result is equal or greater than the Character's BS, place 2 blast markers on the enemy unit.

cards.name: Shroud Protocols
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Stygies VIII units in a detachment are obscured targets.

cards.name: Staunch Defenders
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Agripinaa Commander. The order is changed to Aimed Fire, and until the end of the phase, re-roll wound rolls of 1 for ranged attacks from Agripinaa units in that detachment.

cards.name: Legio Teleportarium
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 Lucius unit, remove it, and then set it up anywhere on the battlefield more than 9” from enemy units.

cards.name: Deafening Assault
cards.ability: Use in the Damage Phase. 1 Metalica unit gains Terror Troops until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Refusal to Yield
cards.ability: Use in the Damage Phase. Graia units in an detachment gain the Ignore Damage(5+) ability until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Wrath of Mars
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Marss units in a detachment can add 1 to wound rolls for ranged attacks.

cards.name: Divine Guidance
cards.ability: Play when you carry out an order. Until end of phase, roll D12s instead of D6s for ranged weapon hit rolls by Adeptus Sororitas in this detachment.

cards.name: Spirit of the Martyr
cards.ability: Play in the action phase. Roll a D12 for every Adeptus Sororitas Infantry unit in a detachment. on a 9+, remove 1 damage marker on that unit.

cards.name: Light of the Emperor
cards.ability: Play at the start of the damage phase. All Adeptus Sororitas units in 1 detachment automatically pass their morale tests.

cards.name: Shield of Faith
cards.ability: Play at the start of the Damage phase. One Adeptus Sororitas unit always rolls D12s when making saving rolls for this phase.

cards.name: Purity of Faith
cards.ability: Play if an enemy plays a psychic power asset within 36” of an Adeptus Sororitas unit. Roll a D12. on a 1-5, keep this card. On a 6+, that psychic power's effects are not resolved. Alternatively, discard this to reroll a hit roll.

cards.name: Faith and Fury
cards.ability: Play before an Adeptus Sororitas unit makes a shoot or fight action. Each hit counts as two hits instead of one.

cards.name: The Passion
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Adepta Sororitas Commander. The order is changed to Advance, and until the end of the phase, double the Move Characterstic for Adepta Sororitas units in that detachment.

cards.name: Hand of the Emperor
cards.ability: Play when you carry out an order. Add 1 to melee weapon attacks by Adepta Sororitas, or 2 for Adepta Sororitas characters.

cards.name: Blood of Martyrs
cards.ability: Play when an Order of Our Martyred Lady warlord is destroyed. Each unit in the warlord's detachment may make a free shoot or fight action.

cards.name: Daughters of the Emperor
cards.ability: Play at the start of the Orders Phase. If you have an Order of the Ebon Chalice Warlord, draw 1 Sisters asset from your discard pile.

cards.name: Devout Serenity
cards.ability: Play when you carry out an order. Replace that order with Aimed Fire. Ranged attacks by Order of the Sacred Rose units can reroll wound rolls of 1 for attacks.

cards.name: Quick to Anger
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Up to 3 Order of the Bloody Rose add 1 to their attacks for fight actions until the end of the phase.

cards.name: Deeds, Not Words
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Up to 2 Order of the Argen Shroud units may make a free shoot or fight action.

cards.name: Stoic Endurance
cards.ability: Use at the start of the Damage phase. Up to 3 Order of the Valorous heart units gain the Ignore Damage (5+) ability.  Then remove this card from the game.

cards.name: Star Pulse
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 Necron Warlord and a point visible to that warlord. Roll a D12 for up to 3 units within 6” of that point, subtracting 2 if the unit is a light character, and adding 2 if it is Super-Heavy or is garrisoning a Defensibel Terrain Feature. On a 8+, place a blast market next to the unit.

cards.name: Entropic Plague
cards.ability: Use at the start of the damage phase. Select 1 enemy unit with 12” of one of your Necron units.  Halve the result of saving throws made for that enemy unit. This effect lasts until the enemy unit succeeds on a saving throw in a damage phase.

cards.name: Resurrection Orb
cards.ability: Use in action phase. Select up to 2 Light Necron units within 6” of a Lord, Overlord, or Destroyer Lord. Remove up to d3 damage markers from that unit.

cards.name: Reconstitution Protocols
cards.ability: Use in action phase. Select a Necron unit. remove up to d3 damage markers from that unit.

cards.name: Stellar Alignment protocols
cards.ability: Use in action phase. A Necron unit acts as if it is at full strength until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Self Destruction
cards.ability: Use when Scarabs make a fight action. Select 1 enemy unit in base contact. Roll a D12 for each model in that scarabs unit. On a 3-7, place a blast marker next to the enemy. On an 8+ place 2 blast markers instead. The Scarabs unit is then destroyed.

cards.name: Cosmic Fire
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 C'tan Shard unit and roll a d12 for each enemy within 9”, adding 1 to the result if the C'tan is Titanic. On a 7+, place a blast marker next to the unit.

cards.name: Antimatter Meteor
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 C'tan Shard and roll a D12. Add 4 to the roll if it is titanic. On a 2-8, place  blast marker next to the enemy unit. On a 9-11, place 2 next to the unit. On a 12-14, place 3 blast markers, and on 15-16 place 4.

cards.name: Sky of Falling Stars
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 C'tan shard and 3 units with 3+ models within 24” of the C'tan. Roll a D12 for each of those unit, adding 3 if the C'tan is Titanic, and 2 if the unit has 10+ models. If the number is 7+, place a blast marker next to the unit.

cards.name: Solar Fury
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Until the end of the turn, select 1 detachment led by a Mephrit commander. Mephrit units add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by ranged weapons within 1/2 the weapon's range for this phase.

cards.name: Awakened By Murder
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 Detachment lead by a Novokh Commander. Until the end of the turn, reroll hit rolls for attacks made with melee weapons by Novokh units.

cards.name: Reclaim a Lost Empire
cards.ability: Use in any phase. Nihilakh units of a selected detachment with a Nihilakh commander gains the Objective Secured ability until the end of the turn. This turn, a Nihilakh Warlord in that detachment can roll a D12 instead of a D6 for one Armour Save roll.

cards.name: Methodical Destruction
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select 1 enemy unit. Until the end of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for Sautekh units targeting that unit.

cards.name: Translocation Beams
cards.ability: Select a detachment led by a Nephrekh Commander. The detachment's order is replaced with 'Assault', and Nephrekh units in the detachment add 5” to their move after doubling it and move as if they could Fly, but cannot end in base contact with enemy units.

cards.name: Adapted to Kill
cards.ability: Use in the Action Phase. Select one Tyranid unit. Until the end of the turn, re-roll hit and wound rolls by that unit, and re-roll saving throws and morale test for that unit.

cards.name: Adrenal Glands
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select one Tyranid Detachment lead by a Tyranid Commander. Up to 3 Tyranid units in that detachment may make a free action.

cards.name: Sporefield
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select on Tyranid Warlord, and select a point visible to that unit. Roll a D12 for each unit within 9” of it, subtracting 2 from the roll of the unit if it is a Light character or Tyranids unit.  On a 7+, place a blast marker next to it.

cards.name: Instinctive Behavior
cards.ability: Use in the Action or Damage phase. Select 1 Tyranid unit that is Out of Command. Until the end of the turn, they do not count as Out of Command, and they add 1 to hit and wound rolls.

cards.name: Endless Swarm
cards.ability: Use in the Reinforcements Step. Select one Tyranid Light unit that was destroyed, and roll D12 and add 4. If the result is greater than the Power of the unit, it is returned to the field within 9” of a field edge, and more than 9” from any enemy units, as a new Detachment. Otherwise return this card to your hand and you can't use it this turn.

cards.name: Shadow in the Warp
cards.ability: Use when an opponent uses a Psychic power, before its effects are resolved, if at least one Tyranid Synapse unit is on the battlefied. Roll a D12. On a 3+, the effects of that Command Asset are not resolved.

cards.name: The Horror
cards.ability: Use in the Damage phase. Choose a Tyranid Psyker unit, and roll a D12. On a 2+, units within 24” of the psyker subtract 2 from their leadership characterstic.

cards.name: Catalyst
cards.ability: Use in the Damage phase. Select a Tyranid Psyker unit and roll a D12. On a 2+, that unit gains Ignore Damage (4+). On a 12+, they gain Ignore Damage (3+) instead.

cards.name: Hyper Aggression
cards.ability: Use when selecting a detachment led by a Behemoth Commander to carry out an order.  Replace their order with Assault, and until the end of the phase, Behemoth units in that detachment add 1 to hit rolls for attacks using melee weapons.

cards.name: Questing Tendrils
cards.ability: Use when selecting a detachment led by a Kraken Commander to carry out an order.  Replace their order with Assault, and until the end of the phase, Kraken units in that detachment triple their move instead of doubling them.

cards.name: Synaptic Imperative
cards.ability: Use at the start of the Damage phase. Select a detachment led by a Leviathan Commander.  Until the end of the phase, Leviathan units in that detachment gain Ignore Damage (5+).

cards.name: Adaptive Toxins
cards.ability: Use in the Action phase. Select a detachment led by a Gorgon Commander. Until the end of the phase Gorgon units add 1 to wound rolls made with melee weapons.

cards.name: Tunnel Networks
cards.ability: Use when selecting a detachment led by a Jormungandr Commander to carry out an order.  Replace their order with Aimed Fire or Advance, and and Jormungandr units are obscured targets.

cards.name: Endless Regeneration
cards.ability: Use in the Action phase.  Select on Hydra unit and remove up to D3 damage from that unit.

cards.name: Bio Barrage
cards.ability: Use when selecting a detachment led by a Kronos Commander to carry out an order.  Replace their order with Aimed Fire, and until the end of the phase, roll D12s instead of D6s for hit rolls made by ranged weapons by Kronos units in that detachment.

cards.name: Webway Portal
cards.ability: Use in the Reinforcements Step. Select one Light Drukhari unit that has been destroyed and roll a D12. If the result exceeds the Power of the unit, place it set up anywhere more than 9” from enemy units. That unit is part of a new detachment. Otherwise, return this card to your hand you can't use it this turn.

cards.name: Drain from Pain
cards.ability: Use in the Action Phase, after a blast marker has been placed on an enemy unit.  Until the end of the turn, Drukhari units within 6” of that unit ignore critically damaged effects, and +1 to their damage rolls.

cards.name: Lightning Speed
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Drukhari Commander. The order is changed to Asault, and until the end of the phase, triple instead of double the Move Characterstic for Drukhari units in that detachment.

cards.name: Hit And Run
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Drukhari Commander. The order is changed to Advance, and at the end of the detachments activation, each Drukhari unit in that Detachment may move 6”.

cards.name: Meat Hooks
cards.ability: Choose a detachment lead by a Drukhari leader.  Up to 4 units with Fly that move over enemy Light units roll a D12. On a 6+, place a blast marker next to one enemy they flew over.

cards.name: Cruel Deception
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Drukhari Commander. The order is changed to Advance, and until the end of the phase, Drukhari units that Fell Back may still attack after Falling Back.

cards.name: Crucible of Malediction
cards.ability: Use if you have a Haemonculus unit when an opponent uses a psychic power Command Asset, after manifesting but before it is resolved. When used, roll a D6 and a D12. If the D6 is a 3+, cancel the effect of the power. If the D12 is a 5+, place a blast marker next to the unit manifesting that power.

cards.name: Torment Bomb
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select one Archon unit in your army, and select one point visible to the Archon. Roll a D12 for each enemy unit within 6” of that point. If the result is greater than or equal to the Leadership of the enemy unit, place a blast marker next to that unitA

cards.name: Combat Drugs
cards.ability: Use in the Action phase. Select one Detachment lead by a Succubus unit in your army. Until the end of turn, roll D12s instead of D6s for hit rolls made by melee weapons with from Wych Cult units in that detachment.

cards.name: Agents of vect
cards.ability: Play when a non-psychic Command Asset is played, before resolving its effect, if you have a Kabal of the Black Heart Warlord.  Roll a D12. On a 4+, the effect of the Command Card is cancelled, and discarded.

cards.name: Failure is not an Option
cards.ability: Play when a Kabal of the Obsidion Rose unit fails its Morale Test. They pass the test instead, and may then make a free shoot or fight action.

cards.name: The Serpent's Kiss
cards.ability: Play in the Action Phase. Select one detachment lead by a Kabal of the Poisoned Tongue Commander. Until the end of the phase, add 1 to wound rolls for weapons made by Kabal of the Poisoned Tongue unit in that detachment, that target Light units.

cards.name: Slay from the Skies
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Kabal of the Flayed Skull Commander. The order is changed to Advance, and until the end of the phase, add 1 for to-hit rolls and double the Move Characterstic for Kabal of Flayed Skull units with Fly in that detachment.

cards.name: No Method of Death Beyond Grasp
cards.ability: Select a detachment led by a Cult of Strife Commander. The detachment's order is replaced with 'Advance'. Select up to 3 Cult of Strife units in that detachment. After activating, they may make an addition shoot action, even targeting enemy units in base contact with them.

cards.name: Hyper Swift Reflexes
cards.ability: Use in the damage phase.  Choose a Cult of the Red Grief unit, a Cult of Red Grief light Character, or both in your army. Until the end of the phase, they Roll D12s for saving throws no matter the size of blast markers next to it.

cards.name: Only the Strong Thrive
cards.ability: Use before carrying out an order for a Detachment lead by a Cult of the Cursed Blade Commander. Until the end of the turn, re-roll hit and wound rolls of 1 for attacks by Cult of Cursed Blade units in that detachment, as well as saving throws of 1 by Cult of Cursed Blade units in that detachment.

cards.name: Connoisseurs of pain
cards.ability: Use at the start of the Damage phase. Select one detachment led by a Prophets of Flesh Commander. Until the end of the phase, Prophets of Felsh units in the deatchment have Ignore Damage (5+) ability.

cards.name: Distillers of Fear
cards.ability: Use at the start of the Damage Phase. Select one detachment lead by a Dark Creed Commander.  Until the end of the phase, Dark Creed units in that detachment have the Terror Troops ability.

cards.name: Administer Punishment
cards.ability: Use in the action phase. Select one detachment led by a Coven of Twelve Commander. Until the end of phase, Coven of Twelve units may make shoot actions against enemy units engaged by friendly units to gain re-rolls on failed to wound rolls. On to-hit rolls of a 1, resolve against friendly units engaging the target.
